reviews.review_description: Truly glorious. So incredibly cool and artsy, and unless colorful modern art dealies with funny imagery isn't your thing, then you don't like VR. This hit the spot something fierce, and is more or less my idea of a perfect VR experience. I'm dazzled.

I have no idea what this is but it’s trippy and weird and cool, there’s not really an objective or plot, it’s more of a series of abstract environments that you travel through. I highly recommend, it’s like 20 minutes long and you’ll have an interesting time

I saw this on Side Quest and This is a great experience! This is so trippy and exciting! Also here’s 10 thing’s you should add!

1. Add a Hand menu!

2. If you can add a body! There are Video’s on YouTube on how to do that!

3. Add Basic physic’s!

4. Add object’s you can pick up like a cup or something!

5. Add a Basic Inventory

6. This is optional but Add a Objective!

7. Add some UI! Make sure it is on the hand because it’s immersion breaking if it is on the face!

8. Add a Tutorial!

9. Add a Slide option for movement!

10. Add turning with the Right Thumb Stick!
